summary: Completed comprehensive testing of News Dashboard with new image and theme toggle features. All toggle functionality working perfectly, dark mode is default, and all existing features remain fully functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/news returns 20 stories successfully
GET /api/news?country=United Kingdom filters correctly
GET /api/news?priority=politics filters correctly
GET /api/news/stats returns complete statistics
GET /api/news/countries returns all supported countries
POST /api/news/refresh triggers refresh successfully
Image toggle (data-testid='toggle-images') exists in header and works correctly
Theme toggle (data-testid='toggle-theme') exists in header and switches themes
Dark mode is the default theme (HTML class 'dark')
When images toggled OFF, news cards show text-only layout without thumbnails
When images toggled ON, news cards show thumbnails properly
Light mode changes background to white and applies light theme CSS variables
Dark mode maintains dark background with light text
Country filter works correctly after theme/image toggles
Priority filter works correctly after theme/image toggles
Refresh button functions properly after theme/image toggles
Toggle states persist correctly during other interactions
Theme switching updates HTML class from 'dark' to 'light' and vice versa
Image toggle properly controls image visibility in NewsCard component
All toggle interactions are smooth without UI glitches

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI features including new toggles working perfectly)
